description: You are a developer on the 'TaskMaster' team. A merge conflict has occurred while trying to merge the 'feature/login-ui' branch into the 'main' branch. Resolve the conflicts in 'app/build.gradle.kts' and 'app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml' by preserving the work from both branches. In 'app/build.gradle.kts', keep both the 'MPAndroidChart' and 'Retrofit' dependencies. In 'activity_main.xml', keep both the 'LineChart' view and the 'LinearLayout' login form. Ensure the project builds successfully and commit the merge resolution.
